feature1.title: Smart Time Management
feature1.desc: Simple time management techniques tailored for people with ADHD. Pomodoro, task splitting, and more.

feature2.title: Task Lists
feature2.desc: A simple visual task system to help you track progress without feeling overwhelmed.

feature3.title: Supportive Community
feature3.desc: Join a community of people who understand you. Share, learn, and grow together.

dashboard.subtitle1: Tools, tips, and support for people with ADHD.
dashboard.subtitle2: Because everyone deserves a chance to focus their way.
